description_long: This object is a detailed accordion displayed on a wooden table with metal supports, all set atop a richly patterned Persian-style rug and a wooden platform. The accordion features a red, marbled exterior with a bellows section, white and red buttons on one side, and a keyboard on the other. The bellows are pleated and bordered by metallic trim, while the button side has multiple rows of circular buttons arranged in a grid. The table also holds a gray cloth and a small metallic device, possibly a metronome or tuning tool. The rug beneath the table is ornate, with intricate red, cream, and gold patterns, and the wooden platform frames the entire setup. No visible brand or logo is present on the accordion.
description: A red, marbled accordion with white and red buttons and a keyboard, displayed on a wooden table over a patterned rug and platform. The setup includes a gray cloth and a small metallic device beside the accordion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the accordion's keyboard, button panel, bellows, and the gray cloth and metallic device on the table.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the accordion, the bellows, and the patterned rug beneath the table.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the accordion and the full expanse of the rug and wooden platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the keyboard and button arrangement, as well as the table's structure and rug details.
